title: Onboarding - Eula page - License Agreement and Privacy Policy links when the internet is turned off
scenario: Onboarding EULA page License Agreement and Privacy Policy links show "Something went wrong" screen when internet is turned off
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. On the onboarding 'Well hello, first things first...' screen, tap the License Agreement link.
3. Turn off internet connection on the device.
expected: The License Agreement or Privacy Policy page should display the content or a graceful offline message. Tapping Cancel should return to the 'Well hello, first things first...' onboarding screen.
